\tzpentry{ID3492}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3492 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \nabla_{\rm rad} = \frac{3\kappa P L_r}{16\pi a c G M_r T^4} \quad\text{; convection if }\nabla_{\rm rad}>\nabla_{\rm ad}. \]
